scenario.name: ctrl_device_upgrade
scenario.send:
MESSAGE sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000002000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagA4104[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] MESSAGE Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-A4104 Content-Type: Application/MANSCDP+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <Notify> <CmdType>DeviceControl</CmdType> <SN>1</SN> <DeviceID>34020000001320000001</DeviceID> <Deviceupgrade> <FirmWare>V2.0</FirmWare> <FileuRL>http://10.0.0.1/firmware/V2.0.bin</FileuRL> <Manufacturer>Test</Manufacturer> <sessionID>123</sessionID> </Deviceupgrade> </Notify>
